description: CompositionLight blue t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with mega sleeves, shaded look and distressed graphic and embroidery embellishment on the frontFittingRegularWash care Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak Flat dry in shade Do not wring or twist To maintain shape, fold and stack rather than hang Moderate warm iron Go bright and vibrant with this sky blue bumble bee tee from spykar. The honeybee graphic with the "Mademoiselle" applique adds a big dose of fun to the tee. Team this with jeans or denim shorts and canvas shoes for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
